scope: Priority source coverage for the Business Model Evidence Agent MVP. This registry connects the three main gaps: merchant/platform policy, competitor filings/product-pricing, and investor materials, plus the next easy-to-connect sources for regulatory trade risk, customer policy, app-store demand quality, and paid-acquisition intensity.

source_groups.name: Merchant fee / seller terms / platform policy
source_groups.evidence_role: Test merchant obligations, seller onboarding, platform rules, ads/traffic economics, logistics/returns burden, and whether low prices depend on subsidy or seller pressure.

source_targets.name: Temu Seller Center
source_targets.current_known_coverage: Seller onboarding, local seller registration, logistics and returns feature area, product ads feature area, seller support language.
source_targets.citation_hint: Capture page URL, retrieval date, visible section heading, and exact excerpt.
source_targets.limits: Some policy details may require seller login. Do not infer fee burden from marketing copy alone.

source_targets.name: Temu Seller Privacy Policy
source_targets.current_known_coverage: Seller data/privacy policy linked from Seller Center onboarding page.
source_targets.citation_hint: Preserve the exact policy URL after following the official link.
source_targets.limits: Privacy policy informs data/compliance risk but does not prove merchant profitability.

source_targets.name: Temu merchant terms, fees, returns, logistics, and ads rules
source_targets.locator: site:seller.temu.com Temu seller fees returns logistics product ads policy
source_targets.citation_hint: Use only official Temu/Seller Center pages for core policy evidence.
source_targets.limits: Search results from blogs or seller guides are lower-tier context unless independently verified.

source_groups.name: Official customer shipping, returns, refund, and buyer-protection policy
source_groups.evidence_role: Test the customer promise, delivery/refund friction, buyer-protection burden, and whether generous policies create structural logistics or returns costs.

source_targets.name: Temu official policies page
source_targets.citation_hint: Capture page URL, retrieval date, policy heading, eligibility window, fee language, and exact excerpt.
source_targets.limits: Official customer policy defines customer-facing obligations but does not prove actual customer satisfaction or seller economics.

source_targets.name: Temu official shipping and returns support page
source_targets.citation_hint: Capture shipping promise, return/refund process, fees, excluded categories, and policy-update date when visible.
source_targets.limits: Support pages can change by country, logged-in state, and order context; country and retrieval date must be preserved.

source_groups.name: Regulatory, customs, de minimis, consumer-protection, and product-safety sources
source_groups.evidence_role: Test whether cross-border low-price economics, product-safety obligations, data/privacy rules, consumer-protection enforcement, or marketplace transparency rules can weaken the model.

source_targets.name: U.S. CBP e-commerce and de minimis guidance
source_targets.citation_hint: Capture rule/program name, publication/update date, shipment threshold language, enforcement context, and URL.
source_targets.limits: CBP pages explain rules and enforcement context; company-specific impact requires separate financial and operational evidence.

source_targets.name: U.S. CBP Section 321 programs
source_targets.citation_hint: Capture Section 321 / de minimis eligibility, data requirements, pilot/program details, and update date.
source_targets.limits: This source supports the trade-policy rule base, not Temu-specific unit economics by itself.

source_targets.name: FTC Temu INFORM Consumers Act enforcement source
source_targets.citation_hint: Capture case name, statute, allegation category, order/penalty status, date, and required marketplace disclosures.
source_targets.limits: Enforcement facts show regulatory fragility; they do not quantify business impact unless linked to financial or operating evidence.

source_targets.name: European Commission Temu DSA / VLOP source
source_targets.citation_hint: Capture DSA status, designation date, obligations, investigation/enforcement status when available, and URL.
source_targets.limits: Use current official Commission pages for enforcement updates; media articles are context only.

source_targets.name: USCC issue brief on Shein, Temu, and Chinese e-commerce
source_targets.citation_hint: Capture publication date, policy-risk category, and exact page number.
source_targets.limits: Government policy research can frame risk but should be separated from binding rules or company-specific disclosures.

source_groups.name: Competitor filings and official reports
source_groups.evidence_role: Compare PDD/Temu against official competitor business models, marketplace economics, logistics/capital intensity, merchant services, and copyability.

source_targets.name: Alibaba Group official financial reports
source_targets.citation_hint: Use annual report, interim report, business segment, revenue recognition, and risk sections.
source_targets.limits: Alibaba has multiple businesses; isolate Taobao/Tmall, AliExpress, Cainiao, and international commerce where possible.

source_targets.name: JD.com official annual reports
source_targets.citation_hint: Use JD Retail, marketplace, logistics, fulfillment, and risk sections.
source_targets.limits: JD has a heavier first-party/logistics model; compare model differences rather than forcing one-to-one metrics.

source_targets.name: Amazon official reports / investor-relations filing links
source_targets.citation_hint: Use third-party seller services, fulfillment, advertising, subscription, international, and risk sections.
source_targets.limits: Amazon is broader than Temu/PDD; compare marketplace, fulfillment, advertising, and seller-policy mechanics.

source_targets.name: Shein official materials and public filing candidates
source_targets.locator: Shein official annual report investor relations IPO filing marketplace supplier model
source_targets.citation_hint: Prefer official/regulator filings over media because SHEIN is private and disclosure may be limited.
source_targets.limits: Private-company evidence is lower coverage and must be labeled carefully.

source_groups.name: Competitor product and pricing surfaces
source_groups.evidence_role: Compare visible price, discounting, couponing, delivery, seller terms, and customer proposition across Temu alternatives.

source_targets.name: Extend Temu product intelligence fixed basket to competitors
source_targets.citation_hint: Preserve URL, retrieval date, product title, price, discount, seller, shipping, delivery, review count, and parser metadata.
source_targets.limits: Fixed basket must remain stable; broad scraping is out of scope.

source_targets.name: Amazon comparable product basket
source_targets.locator: Amazon low-price home goods, electronics accessories, fashion accessories comparable to Temu baskets
source_targets.limits: Amazon prices and delivery promises can vary by location, account, Prime status, and seller.

source_targets.name: AliExpress comparable product basket
source_targets.locator: AliExpress low-price home goods electronics accessories fashion accessories comparable to Temu baskets
source_targets.limits: Shipping, customs, and seller terms can vary materially across listings.

source_targets.name: SHEIN comparable product basket
source_targets.locator: SHEIN low-price fashion accessories home goods comparable to Temu baskets
source_targets.limits: Fashion assortment turns quickly, so fixed-basket comparability must be reviewed.

source_groups.name: App-store ranking, rating, review volume, and review-topic evidence
source_groups.evidence_role: Test whether customer adoption, review volume, rating quality, refund/shipping/product-quality complaints, and repeat-use clues support the business model.

source_targets.name: Apple App Store Temu page
source_targets.citation_hint: Preserve country, app id, rank/category when available, rating, review count, visible review date, and URL.
source_targets.limits: Ratings and review snippets are app-level signals with sampling, country, and platform bias.

source_targets.name: Google Play Temu page
source_targets.citation_hint: Preserve country, app id, rating, installs/review count when visible, visible review text metadata, and URL.
source_targets.limits: Visible Google Play reviews are partial and can vary by location, device, language, and logged-in state.

source_targets.name: Main alternative-data app-store connector
source_targets.citation_hint: Preserve raw seed/source URL and normalized metric metadata.
source_targets.limits: V1 connector normalizes cached/seed observations; live collection is still pending.

source_groups.name: Paid acquisition, promotion intensity, search, web-rank, and coupon signals
source_groups.evidence_role: Test whether growth is organic, promotion-driven, ad-driven, or subsidy-heavy, and whether competitor pressure is forcing paid acquisition.

source_targets.name: PDD digital demand monitor paid-ad and promotion signals
source_targets.citation_hint: Preserve market, source type, brand id, metric name, current value, trend window, and raw artifact path.
source_targets.limits: Paid-ad libraries and coupon surfaces are directional; they do not directly prove CAC or unit economics.

source_targets.name: Google Ads Transparency Center locator for Temu and competitors
source_targets.locator: Google Ads Transparency Center Temu SHEIN AliExpress Amazon ads
source_targets.citation_hint: Preserve advertiser identity, region, visible ad count/card sample, retrieval date, and URL.
source_targets.limits: Public ad counts are incomplete and may not map cleanly to spend.

source_targets.name: Main alternative-data Google Trends connector
source_targets.citation_hint: Preserve search terms, region, date window, and raw source metadata.
source_targets.limits: Search interest is relative and not the same as revenue or active buyers.

source_groups.name: Investor presentations and investor events
source_groups.evidence_role: Capture management framing, KPI narrative, strategy changes, margin-investment explanations, and webcast/event materials.

source_targets.name: PDD quarterly results page
source_targets.citation_hint: Extract earnings releases, webcast links, and any visible presentation entries by quarter.
source_targets.limits: Management communication is evidence of framing, not proof of economics.

source_targets.name: PDD presentations page
source_targets.citation_hint: Preserve deck URL, date, event name, and slide/page locator.
source_targets.limits: If no presentation is available, record `not_disclosed` rather than guessing from earnings releases.

source_targets.name: Local investor presentation / investor day deck intake
source_targets.citation_hint: Preserve file path, page number if available, slide title, and excerpt.
source_targets.limits: Local files need source URL/provider/license metadata before use outside the system.

coverage_policy: Core business-model claims require P0/P1 sources.
Management materials are medium-reliability framing and must be cross-checked against official filings and financial evidence.
Competitor materials should prefer official filings and official IR pages before media commentary.
Product/pricing surfaces must use stable fixed baskets or clearly labeled manual snapshots.
If a target is login-gated or unavailable, record the missing source and do not infer the policy.
